summary: P9 system management UI has passed FE-015 implementation, VAL-005 clean build, TEST-007 browser write-operation E2E, and REV-005 review. Members, departments, system roles and dictionaries are real usable pages. Full project deployability remains false until the remaining visual usable phases pass.

deferredRisks.reason: Create-system idempotency still uses single-JVM memory storage. Production multi-instance consistency needs shared storage or a database idempotency table.
npm ci reports 2 moderate audit items. No npm audit fix --force was applied because it may force dependency upgrades; schedule dependency governance after trial deployment.
OpenAPI nonce replay, IP whitelist, OpenAPI idempotency conflict and high-concurrency scenarios remain recommended before production launch.

verification: mvn -pl examine-web -am -DskipTests package passed after stopping the jar process that locked target/unexamine.jar
npm.cmd run build passed and generated frontend/dist
npm.cmd run preview -- --port 4173 started local production preview
TEST-007 browser E2E passed for login, system enter, members, departments, roles and dictionaries
Department delete restriction verified: parent department with children has delete button disabled
fullProjectDeployable remains false because P10-P12 visual usable phases are not complete
